hooks.command: if [ -f "$HOME/.prompt-optimizer/adapters/claude-code.sh" ]; then BLOCK_ON_HIGH=on bash "$HOME/.prompt-optimizer/adapters/claude-code.sh"; elif [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.align/align-route.sh" ]; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.align/align-route.sh"; elif [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.align/HOOK-REMINDER.txt" ]; then cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.align/HOOK-REMINDER.txt"; else printf "%s\n" "[对齐] 未检测到 Prompt Optimizer runtime。请重新安装并运行 /align-init。"; fi
